questions.text: Rate the level of pain in your knee

choices.1: No pain, activities are unlimited, I do not notice my knee
choices.2: Light pain while overusing or when doing strenuous activity. I don't think that my knee is a big problem
choices.3: Some problems with strenuous activities. I'm limited or can't do activities such as heavy work. Occasionally during simple walking I have minor symptoms. Some medicine is needed
choices.4: Pain often or with vigorous activities such as sports. Activities unlimited with light activities. Walking over 2 km possible. Pain medicine needed weekly or regularly
choices.5: Pain limits activities. I can't do sports. Walking distance varies by knee condition. Walking less than 2 km due to knee pain. Pain medicine needed regularly
choices.6: Pain does not limit. In all activities. Pain medicine is not needed
choices.7: Pain limits. No pain during simple daily activities. Minimal symptoms with working. Going up and down from standing to sitting
choices.8: Pain present during. Simple daily activities

questions.text: Rate the level of swelling in your knee

choices.2: Occasional. Only after more demanding activities
choices.3: Some limitations with strenuous activity only. No interferes with daily life
choices.4: Occasionally. Occasional swelling with daily activity
choices.5: Frequently. Frequent swelling with daily activity that interferes with normal activity

questions.text: Rate the stability of your knee (does your knee give out)

choices.3: Sometimes during athletic or vigorous activities
choices.4: Frequent. Often with vigorous activities, occasionally with daily activities
choices.5: Every step. Frequently during daily activities. Requires support to walk

choices.1: Very strenuous activities, such as jumping or pivoting as in basketball or soccer
choices.2: Strenuous activities, such as heavy physical work, skiing or tennis
choices.3: Moderate activities such as moderate physical work, running or jogging
choices.4: Light activities such as walking, housework or yard work
choices.5: Unable to perform any of the above activities due to knee

choices.2: Some limitations, able to walk over 2 km

questions.text: Rate your ability to use stairs

choices.3: One step at a time with some difficulty
choices.4: Can go up but not down
choices.5: Severe problems, need handrail or cane

choices.2: Some limitations, able to run 1-2 km or more
choices.3: Moderate problems, jogging less than 1 km only
choices.4: Severe problems, jogging less than 0.5 km only
choices.5: Severely limited, unable, cannot jog at all

questions.text: Rate your ability to jump and twist
